title: $random sequences with the same seed do not equal

features.name: $random seed reinitialization produces different sequence
features.description: Code should include $random(seed) calls where the seed variable is reinitialized to the same value before a second sequence of random calls, but produces a different sequence instead of repeating

features.name: $random seed modification behavior
features.description: Code should include $random function calls that modify the seed argument, demonstrating that $random updates the seed value after each call
